---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternative Solutions
Briefly describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
Provide a specific use case where this feature would be valuable.

## Benefits
What benefits would this feature provide?

## Implementation Notes
(Optional) Any thoughts on how this could be implemented?

## Related Issues
Does this relate to any existing issues? Reference them here (e.g. #123)

## Additional Context
Add any other context, sketches, or wireframes that would help explain your idea.
